title: Redstone Arsenal
body:
Redstone Arsenal adds tools and weaponry which harness the power of Redstone Flux, the energy system added by CoFH and Thermal Expansion.

CoFH Core is required to play this mod! It can be found here: CoFH Core

For more detailed information on the mod, please visit the website at TeamCoFH!
Discord

https://discordapp.com/invite/uRKrnbH
Changelog
